title: Will legislation that reauthorizes FISA Section 702 authority become law before Jun 19, 2026?

current.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 4%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: FISA 702 lapsed June 12/13 after the House voted it down and recessed until June 23; with Speaker Johnson declining an emergency recall, enactment before June 19 is mechanically near-impossible.
reference_classes: post-lapse surveillance reauth within a week ~0%
